cases.passage: My school is organizing a charity event to collect funds for a local orphanage. The event will be held on the school grounds, and we are expecting a large number of students, teachers, and guests to attend. As a member of the organizing committee, I have been tasked with writing an invitation notice to be distributed to all the students and staff members. The notice should include the date, time, and venue of the event, along with the details of the activities that will take place. It should also mention the dress code and the expected behavior of the attendees. The notice should be posted on the school notice board and sent to all the students and staff members via email.

questions.q: What is the main purpose of writing the notice?
opts: To invite students to a party
(B) To inform staff members about a meeting
(C) To invite students to a charity event
questions.explanation: The main purpose of writing the notice is to invite students to a charity event.

questions.q: What is the expected behavior of the attendees?
questions.explanation: The expected behavior of the attendees is to be respectful and disciplined.

questions.q: Where will the notice be posted?
opts: On the school social media page
questions.explanation: The notice will be posted on the school notice board.
The notice will be sent to all the students and staff members via email.

questions.q: What is the dress code for the event?
questions.explanation: The dress code for the event is not specified in the passage.

cases.passage: The school principal has announced that the annual sports day will be held on the school grounds. The event will include various competitions such as running, jumping, and throwing events. The students have been asked to participate in the events and show their skills. The event will be open to all the students, staff members, and their families. The school has invited a renowned sports coach to give a motivational speech before the events. The event will start at 9:00 am and will continue until 1:00 pm. The school has also arranged for refreshments and snacks for the attendees.

questions.q: What is the purpose of the sports day?
opts: To raise funds for the school
questions.explanation: The purpose of the sports day is to promote physical education.

questions.q: Who will give a motivational speech at the event?
questions.explanation: A renowned sports coach will give a motivational speech at the event.

questions.q: What time will the event start?
questions.explanation: The event will start at 9:00 am.

questions.q: What will be provided for the attendees?
questions.explanation: The school has arranged for refreshments and snacks for the attendees.

questions.q: Who is eligible to participate in the events?
opts: (C) All students, staff members, and their families
questions.explanation: All students, staff members, and their families are eligible to participate in the events.
